title: ItemSetItemsResponse
description: Schema for ItemSetItemsResponse in Nuix REST API

query.description: Query items that should be included.  If a query is not supplied it defaults to an empty string, which returns all items.

operationType.description: The operation to perform on the item set.

failedItemGuidList.description: The list of failed item guids.

successfulItemGuidList.description: The list of successful item guids.
